headline: Needham Reiterates Buy on KLA, Maintains $1800 Price Target
summary: Needham  analyst Charles Shi   reiterates KLA (NASDAQ:KLAC) with a Buy and maintains $1800 price target.

headline: KLA’s $7b Buyback And Dividend Hike Versus Valuation Concerns
summary: KLA (NasdaqGS:KLAC) has announced a new $7b share repurchase authorization. The company also approved a 21% increase in its quarterly dividend. Both capital return actions were outlined during KLA’s 2026 Investor Day. KLA, trading at around $1,418.64, is pairing these capital return moves with a share price that has risen 100.5% over the past year and 11.3% year to date. The stock is also up 5.5% over the past week, despite a 3.1% decline over the past month. This highlights how active the...
